commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: He that was truly the Son of God, and knew all things, learnt practically, and taught us perfect obedience in suffering and dying a cruel death on the cross. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Of growing up; and, when grown up, is not eager to be recognised, but is furthermore contumelious to Himself, and is baptized by His own servant; and repels with words alone the assaults of the tempter; while from being "Lord "He becomes "Master "teaching man to escape death, having been trained to the exercise of the absolute forbearance of offended patience.
